Wraith Bone Hammer  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 26
DMG: 8 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5 WIS: +2 INT: +2
WT: 7.3 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

# Mar 12 2002 at 10:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768457739
15 posts
What would make this hammer a weeeee bit more attractive would be to make it throwable..i know my cleric would love it..centi warhammer in primary,charred guardian shield in secondary, wraithbone hammer in ranger..that makes for 13 wis and 10 str 5 sta in those 3 slots../sighs..but verant wouldn't dream of something like this cuz the players want it..

info
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2002 at 4:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767756461
10 posts
I bought one from a vendor in Shadowhaven for 60 pp, so SOMEONE on Sol Ro doesn't think they're worth Gfaybaying any more.

I have heard, just a bit of unconfirmed trivia, that CoM mobs do not need to be snared unless they have this weapon. Don't know why, maybe they're running away muttering "My precious" to themselves as they lovingly cradle their hammers...
▲ Page top
RE: info
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2002 at 8:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772419984
8 posts
As far as my experience goes, i have seen this hammer drop like 10 times in CoM and has always been from non-running Skellies anyway, so the Snare tactic would be moot anyways. I could be wrong but i havent seen it drop from anything else.

▲ Page top
RE: good deal
QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2001 at 8:20 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
No, they dont go for that any more. 300 is upper limit, can find for low as 100 or so, 200-300 if you are in a hurry. Average price is inflated by the old prices from last december. Used to be a 1k item, but dropping fast. Luclin will probably push these into the sub 100 range.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 17 2001 at 5:36 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) know what sucks? i lost mine in a spirit pouch (no rent bag). i'm a ******. also lost a hq bear skin in it. if you feel sorry for me, and would like to donate one to me to compensate my dumba$$, email me at: stupidretard@lostmyf***ingwraithbonehammer.com

got lots for guildies
QuoteReply
# Sep 10 2001 at 9:42 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249475779
Scholar
148 posts
About 3 to 6 of these drop in an evening in CoM (90-120 minutes). Most of my guildies who want one have one by now. I have no clue what these sell for nowadays.

As other comments note: if you see a hammer in the mob's hands, it is wielding this.

Pricing Recommendation
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2001 at 1:38 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591764952155
6 posts
I sent a recommendation to Alla that he try to quote MEDIAN values to compensate for the wide variance in price that these type of items see. Median (or even a rolling last-5 prices mean) would be more meaningful (no pun intended) for this entire pricing board. Of course we are all experts since we don't do all the hard work here to maintain the page...grin. Thanks Alla!!!

-Jhondra
▲ Page top
Stamina
QuoteReply
# Sep 02 2001 at 3:01 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
My ranger has one of these, and at lvl 19 it sucks up his stamina fast! While it's still great fer bashin', something with a lil less weight would be nice, hehe.
▲ Page top
Price is way off for Rodcet Nife server
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2001 at 7:21 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
I recently bought one of these for 170pp in EC, thinking I got a bang-up deal, since I had seen the prices here. Since then, I have seen two seperate auctions for these at 150pp, as well as some in the 200-250 range. Maybe it's a server specific thing, but they sure don't get 500pp on mine. Mind you, the 170pp I spent was well worth it, big upgrade from my Sarnak Enforcer.
▲ Page top
On Brell too...
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2001 at 10:20 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593965874600
View User Forum
Sage
268 posts
These are a fairly common drop (one a night) from CoM. I regularly sell them for 100-150p. Most lower levels who would benifit from this hammer don't have much more then 150p to spend anyways.
▲ Page top
RE: And on 7th
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2001 at 9:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344140492
366 posts
These are turning into the equivalent of the Axe of the Iron Back for wis casters/hybrids -
Very nice equipment that you can buy early on and will leave you selling any weapon you get as a drop for quite a while =)
My ranger did get some strange looks dual weilding these, but 10str and 4wis made me glad I had kept all my skills up.

Already sent a suggestion to Alla that he replace the average price with a last 30 or 60 days price, until that's changed - Look at the price detail to get an idea of the current price.
▲ Page top
Drops etc.
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2001 at 4:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965869700
Scholar
49 posts
Dropped near the entrance to the stables off some type of skeleton. He was wielding it, so it was visible that it was coming. Like all the other loot, though, it's on a random seeding table and can drop off any mob in that table -- meaning you can hunt by the entrance or anywhere else and have just about the same probability of dropping it.

There are a lot in circulation on Karana right now so I suspect the real selling price is substantially lower than the listed data.

Maladamuk Heartmender
Gnomish Cleric of the 49th Ring
Storm's Justice
Karana Server

QuoteReply
# May 14 2001 at 7:59 AM Rating: Default

This is the most common weapon drop nearish the entrance.
I have seen 3 of these drop and only 1 other weapon which was master Wu trancestick.
That was over a 1 week time period of irregular play.
